params.extra_check: IMPORTANT: This is a NORMAL prompt (no sensitive data). We need to capture the normal response format of runInferenceTranscript API. In DevTools Network tab: 1) Find runInferenceTranscript request, 2) Check Response Headers (Content-Type, Transfer-Encoding), 3) Copy the response body format (first 500 chars). Also check if it is SSE, NDJSON, or plain JSON.

notes: Normal prompt to capture Notion AI response FORMAT (not block test). Need Content-Type and response body structure of /api/v3/runInferenceTranscript for warning impl.
